_note: v8.3.28 initial sample pull -- one day of tick data for all 12 v10-universe tickers. Goal: validate the ATR-from-ticks vs ATR-from-1m-bars hypothesis (production's tick-level ATR is tighter than our 1-min OHLC ATR, which is why my replay's stops are 1.5x wider than production's). If this 1-day pull demonstrates the gap, we expand to the full year via a subsequent trigger. Expected size: ~120 MB compressed (~30 MB per ticker for the most liquid).
